microsoft_ft: Architected and scaled Azure's recovery validation platform from a 2-person operation into a **self-service, enterprise-grade system**, standardizing ALM workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and deliver $14M+ impact across Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform — defining requirements, environment strategy, and scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, production-ready model.

Built an **internal AI agent** for drill planning, integrating LLM-powered automation into structured workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and expand drill capacity by 21% without adding headcount.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as **bridge lead** for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring strict compliance and least-privilege access design.

Championed emerging automation tools and **proactive resilience testing**, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a 94% recovery rate — establishing a new platform standard for continuous validation across Azure infrastructure.
microsoft_2023: Drove **product adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting demos and training sessions that activated usage across 14 Azure service teams and saved 37 engineering hours monthly through low-code automation.

Influenced the **platform roadmap** to include intent-based YAML generation by leading 11+ structured discovery interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating findings into prioritized requirements for leadership.

Improved **data retrieval performance by 83%** by implementing metadata governance standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool — reducing lookup friction across a high-volume internal knowledge base.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ teams.

Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual toil per region launch**, then built a product roadmap to automate critical paths — directly informing the Power Platform and CI/CD pipeline investment strategy.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to track operational toil and automation coverage across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target high-impact gaps and prioritize platform improvements with data-driven confidence.
amazon_robotics: Defined the **legacy OS migration strategy** for a 2,000+ unit pilot fleet, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and achieving zero operational downtime through structured environment and dependency management.

Implemented **automated CI/CD pipelines** in partnership with IT, Operations, and Engineering teams, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual release overhead across the robotics platform.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process across a distributed cross-functional team.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals through a structured CRM process, improving pipeline visibility and conversion at each stage.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google Business profile for search and lead quality.

Improved leadership pricing models by analyzing **1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks, delivering a profitability framework that informed smarter resource allocation and job-level cost decisions.
